profile.name: Mohammad Tauqueer
profile.title: Software Engineer
profile.bio: I'm Tauqueer — Bangalore engineer, CS @ Scaler × BITS Pilani. Currently on the engineering side at Metacognition, where I shipped Engram — an FPA that gives AI agents memory that actually sticks. Side quests: meet-bot, Staygrad, and writing Unix shells in Java because POSIX won't implement itself. Cinematography, OSC & Reinforce Club eat whatever RAM is left.

education.description: Currently pursuing my primary CS degree with focus on practical software development, algorithms, and modern technologies.
Pursuing a parallel degree to strengthen my theoretical foundation and expand my academic credentials in computer science.
Completed higher secondary education with Science stream, building foundation in Mathematics and Physics.

experience.description: Engineering side at getmetacognition.com — shipped Engram, an FPA that gives AI agents episodic memory. Full-stack across frontend, backend, and product features.
Developer relations before moving to engineering — community, docs, and getting builders hooked on memory-native AI.

projects.name: meet-bot
projects.description: TypeScript meeting assistant — captures live audio, queues jobs, and processes transcripts with AI.

projects.name: Staygrad
projects.description: Student-focused platform to discover, compare, and book verified hostels and PG accommodations.

projects.name: CodeCrafters Shell
projects.description: Building a Unix shell in Java (CodeCrafters challenge).

projects.name: Crypto Price Tracker
projects.description: A web application that displays real-time cryptocurrency prices with interactive charts and price history for top 10 cryptocurrencies.

projects.name: Survivals Edge
projects.description: A voxel-based survival island created during a hackathon with custom terrain, trees, and a house.
